leadText: Camerupt (Japanese: バクーダ Bakuuda) is a dual-type Fire/Ground Pokémon introduced in Generation III. It evolves from Numel starting at level 33. Camerupt can Mega Evolve into Mega Camerupt using the Cameruptite. Mega Camerupt was introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Camerupt is a quadrupedal Pokémon that resembles a Bactrian camel . It has two gray volcanoes on its back, which are bigger on a female's back than those on a male. It also has a stout body with red shaggy fur and three blue ring-shaped markings on both sides. It has bangs on top of its head, droopy ears, and a tan fur-less muzzle. Its body contains amounts of molten lava of 18,000 °F (10,000 °C), which Camerupt voluntarily erupts out of its humps if it is angered. [ 1 ] Otherwise, its humps erupt automatically every ten years. [ 2 ] As shown in the Pokémon the Series: Ruby and Sapphire episode Candid Camerupt! , it can become uncontrollably angry when it is struck in the face. It lives in the craters of volcanoes . Forms [ edit | edit source ] Camerupt can Mega Evolve into Mega Camerupt. As Mega Camerupt, the humps on its back have transformed into one large and very active volcano. Its fur expands and grows to a point where only its hooves can be seen, and its ears and the tufts on its head grow thicker and longer, standing on end. It gains a gray M on the front of its face and loses the three blue rings on its body. Magma is constantly bubbling up from within its body. It has a deep hatred of water or any moisture, with an explosive personality, and a short temper. The volcano on its back erupts constantly in an effort to intimidate its foes. [ 3 ] It releases a particularly strong eruption once its rage culminates. Mega Camerupt can unleash fire explosions after charging up. Mega Camerupt is capable of creating and launching molten, round rock from its hump. These molten rocks will eventually explode over time. Mega Camerupt Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Camerupt evolves from Numel . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Numel Fire Ground → First Evolution Camerupt Fire Ground ↑ Stated in Camerupt's Pokédex entries for Pokémon Emerald and Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver . ↑ Stated in Camerupt's Pokédex entries for Pokémon Sapphire , Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen , and Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire , as well as in dialogue in the Pokémon Mystery Dungeon series , and shown in the animated series . ↑ http://www.pokemonrubysapphire.com/en-us/pokemon/new-mega-evolutions/mega-camerupt

Pokémon Mystery Dungeon: Explorers of Time and Explorers of Darkness : Camerupt is a member of Team Flame. Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation III. Generation III Hoenn #102 Kanto #— Ruby Camerupt has a volcano inside its body. Magma of 18,000 degrees F courses through its body. Occasionally, the humps on this Pok é mon 's back erupt, spewing the superheated magma. Sapphire The humps on Camerupt 's back are formed by a transformation of its bones. They sometimes blast out molten magma. This Pok é mon apparently erupts often when it is enraged. Emerald A Pok é mon that lives in the crater of a volcano. Every 10 years, the volcanoes on its back erupt violently. Research is under way on the cause of eruption. FireRed If angered, the humps on its back erupt in a shower of molten lava. It lives in the craters of volcanoes. LeafGreen Generation IV Sinnoh #— Johto #— Diamond It has volcanoes on its back. If magma builds up in its body, it shudders, then erupts violently. Pearl Platinum HeartGold It lives in the crater of a volcano. It is well known that the humps on its back erupt every 10 years. SoulSilver Generation V Unova B2 W2 : #205 Black It has volcanoes on its back. If magma builds up in its body, it shudders, then erupts violently. White Black 2 The volcanoes on its back have a major eruption every 10 years--or whenever it becomes really angry. White 2 Generation VI Central Kalos #— Coastal Kalos #— Mountain Kalos #— Hoenn #107 X The volcanoes on its back have a major eruption every 10 years--or whenever it becomes really angry. Y If angered, the humps on its back erupt in a shower of molten lava. It lives in the craters of volcanoes. Omega Ruby Camerupt has a volcano inside its body. Magma of 18,000 degrees Fahrenheit courses through its body. Occasionally, the humps on this Pokémon's back erupt, spewing the superheated magma. Alpha Sapphire The humps on Camerupt's back are formed by a transformation of its bones. They sometimes blast out molten magma. This Pokémon apparently erupts often when it is enraged. Generation VII Alola #— Kanto #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Generation VII . Generation VIII Galar #— Isle of Armor #— Crown Tundra #— Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Sword, Shield , and Legends: Arceus . Brilliant Diamond It has volcanoes on its back. If magma builds up in its body, it shudders, then erupts violently. Shining Pearl Generation IX Paldea #152 Kitakami #— Blueberry #126 Lumiose #117 Hyperspace #— Scarlet It lives in the crater of a volcano. It is well known that the humps on its back erupt every 10 years. Violet If angered, the humps on its back erupt in a shower of molten lava. It lives in the craters of volcanoes. Legends: Z-A The volcanoes on its back have a major eruption every 10 years—or whenever it becomes really angry. Mega Camerupt Legends: Z-A When this Pokémon's rage reaches a boiling point, the huge volcano in the hump on its back erupts violently, spewing molten lava. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry AG046 Camerupt Ash's Pokédex Camerupt, the Eruption Pokémon. Camerupt have volcanoes inside their bodies, which can erupt and spew lava from the humps on their back when angry.
